race.description: Port Lincoln Hotel Class One Handicap
race.comment: TRIPOD TERROR (1) hasn't won for nearly a year but is knocking on the door. Comes through strong form races and caught the eye again last start when flashing home to miss by a lip. This looks easier and should be his for the taking. RENEGADE CHIEF (2) got off the mark here at the latest - stalking the early speed before pouncing on them. Doesn't lose anything in the saddle with Milnes taking over and draws well again. Biggest threat. GRECIAN STORM (5) went forward and kept finding when challenged, digging deep to score by half a length. Has enough pace to offset the wide draw and can keep the ball rolling. GAME OVER (3) is another last-start maiden winner. Possesses a positive racing pattern and will give himself every chance again on speed.
